descricao: Scrapes a finance page, cleans the HTML, uses GPT-4o-mini to extract financial facts in structured format, and saves them for later embedding.
problema: Financial content relevant to the chatbot was only available as raw HTML, with no structure for AI consumption.
resultado: Financial data extracted and normalized automatically, ready for ingestion into the knowledge base.
metrica: Continuous, structured extraction of financial content
destaques: Structured extraction with an output parser
Storage in a data table for the embedding pipeline
